sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39136" key="e)pidekatei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδεκᾰτ-εία </orth>( <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδειπν-ία</orth> Thrasyll.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).101</biblScope> </bibl>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Astrol., <sense id="n39136.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καθυπερτέρησις</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:102:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">102.33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
